claimText: LMU IfKW guidance says material containing personal information must not be entered into AI systems without consent and unless German or EU data-protection standards are met.
normalizedValue: Personal information requires consent and German/EU data-protection compliance before AI upload

citation.citationTitle: The use of AI by students
